ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address of the customer */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the order */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Delivery status of the order (e.g., pending, in transit, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES addresses ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order containing the item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "item_price" TEXT /* Price of the product in the order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order item */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount applied to the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product (trigger for stock replenishment) */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the customer last logged in */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the customer account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer associated with the address */,
  "address_line1" TEXT /* First line of the address */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Second line of the address (optional) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province of the address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip or postal code of the address */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether this is the customer's default address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the inventory */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in the warehouse */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "min_reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity to trigger a reorder */,
  "max_reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity to order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address of the warehouse */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  "current_inventory_value" TEXT /* Current total value of inventory in the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, warehouse staff, admin) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order containing the returned item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., damaged, wrong item) */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Current status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, refunded) */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was initiated */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the shipment */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the shipment */,
  "shipping_carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used (e.g., USPS, UPS, FedEx) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
